nasb.text: Nard and saffron, calamus and cinnamon, With all the trees of frankincense, Myrrh and aloes, along with all the finest spices.

esv.text: nard and saffron, calamus and cinnamon, with all trees of frankincense, myrrh and aloes, with all choice spices—

cnv.text: 有哪噠和番紅花，菖蒲和肉桂， 以及各種乳香樹、 沒藥和沉香，與各樣精選的香料。

ccb.text: 哪哒和番红花、菖蒲和肉桂、 没药和沉香， 以及一切上好的香料。
